name: idx_resource
sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_resource ON resource_uri(uri, id);

name: idx_property
sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_property ON property(uri, id);

name: idx_gspo
sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_splg_gspl ON splg(g, s, p, lex);

name: idx_gpos
sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_splg_gpls ON splg(g, p, lex, s);

name: idx_gosp
sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_splg_glsp ON splg(g, lex, s, p);

name: idx_g_spo
sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_spog_gspo ON spog(g, s, p, o);

name: idx_g_pos
sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_spog_gpos ON spog(g, p, o, s);

name: idx_g_osp
sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_spog_gosp ON spog(g, o, s, p);
